replacements.description: The Betrayer — If damage would be dealt to CARDNAME, prevent that damage and an opponent of your choice gains control of it.

statics.description: Berzerker — CARDNAME attacks or blocks each combat if able.

triggers.description: Sigil of Corruption — When you lose control of CARDNAME, draw two cards.
